briefdescription.para: Callback type for all interrupts defined.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the event. For current core version, this parameter is "OR" of 0 or more XDSI2RX_ISR_*_MASK constants defined in xdsi_hw.h.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set bit in a register.

parameterdescription.para: is a base address of IP
is offset where the register is present
is the part of the bitname before _MASK

briefdescription.para: This function is used to reset bit in a register.

parameterdescription.para: is a base address of IP
is offset where the register is present
is the part of the bitname before _MASK

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegisterOffset, u32 BitMask, u32 BitShift)
memberdef.name: XDsi2Rx_GetBitField

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the value of bitfield from register.

parameterdescription.para: is a base address of IP
is offset where the register is present
is the part of the bitname before _MASK
is the part of the bitname before _SHIFT

simplesect.para: Bit Field Value in u32 format

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegisterOffset, u32 BitMask, u32 BitShift, u32 Value)
memberdef.name: XDsi2Rx_SetBitField

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the value of bitfield from register.

parameterdescription.para: is a base address of IP
is offset where the register is present
is the part of the bitname before _MASK
is the part of the bitname before _SHIFT
is to be set. Passed in u32 format.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to start the soft reset process by setting the soft reset bit in the Core Configuration Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI2 instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if a controller is ready or still in reset stage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to stop the soft reset process by resetting the soft reset bit in the Core Configuration Register.This is done usually after Reset in Progress is 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to stop the packet processing by resetting Enable core bit in the Core Configuration Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to start the packet processing by setting Enable core bit in the Core Configuration Register.This is done after the configuration of active lanes, interrupt masks, etc.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the Core is enabled by checking the core enable bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: SET or RESET in u32 format

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable the global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This is used after setting the interrupts mask before enabling the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to disable the global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This is done after disabling the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to find out which interrupts are registered for.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to find out which events have triggered the interrupt source, presently DSI supporting Undefined data type and pixel under flow error, the ISR register bits will set when respective interrupt triggers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to acknowledge/clear the events.

detaileddescription.para: Once the interrupt occur the same value need to write in ISR register

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.
is Bit Mask for ack of interrupts

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get pixel format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: 0x0E â?" Packed RGB565 0x1E- packed RGB666 0x2E â?" Loosely packed RGB666 0x3E- Packed RGB888 0x0B- Compressed Pixel Stream

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set interrupt mask to enable interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This is done before enabling the core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.
Interrupts to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to disable interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DSI Instance to be worked on.
Interrupts to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Look up the hardware configuration for a device instance.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device to lookup for

simplesect.para: The reference to the configuration record in the configuration table (in xdsi2rx_g.c) corresponding to the BaseAddress or if not found, a NULL pointer is returned.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the XDsi2Rx instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on.
is the device configuration structure containing information about a specific DSI.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function will enable/disable the IP Core to start processing.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on.
will be used to indicate Enable or Disable action.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM if user passes invalid parameter.

briefdescription.para: This function will do a reset of the IP.

detaileddescription.para: Register ISR gets reset. Internal FIFO(command queue) gets flushed. FSM stops processing further packets. Controller gracefully ends by waiting for the current sub-block in operation to complete its task and mark next byte as LP byte to end the transfer. Once soft reset is released, controller start from VSS packet. (that is new video frame)

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function will configure protocol reg with video mode, Blank packet mode, Blank packet Type, End of Transmisstion packet.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on.

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: This test checks if the Pixel mode has been set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDsi2Rx instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the read value was not equal to GUI parameter

briefdescription.para: this function will get the information from the gui settings and other protocol control register values like pixel mode, pixel format.

parameterdescription.para: is the xdsi2rx instance to operate on
is going to be filled up by this function and returned to the caller.

briefdescription.para: This routine installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Invoked by this driver when: ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XDSI2RX_HANDLER_UNSUPPORT_DATATYPE Unsupported data type XDSI2RX_HANDLER_CRC_ERROR CRC error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_ECC1_BIT_ERROR ECC 1 bit error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_ECC2_BIT_ERROR ECC 2 bit error XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE1 SOT sync error on line 1 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE1 SOT error on line 1 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE2 SOT sync error on line 2 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE2 SOT error on line 2 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE3 SOT sync error on line 3 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE3 SOT error on line 3 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_SYNC_ERR_LANE4 SOT sync error on line 4 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_SOT_ERR_LANE4 SOT error on line 4 XDSI2RX_HANDLER_STOP_STATE STOP state XDSI2RX_HANDLER_LM_ASYNC_FIFO_FULL Long msg asyn fifo full. XDSI2RX_HANDLER_STREAM_ASYNC_FIFO_FULL stream async fifo full XDSI2RX_HANDLER_GSP_FIFO_NE generic short packet fifo not empty XDSI2RX_HANDLER_GSP_FIFO_FULL generic short packet fifo full XDSI2RX_HANDLER_FRAME_STARTED frame started

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
is the type of call back to be registered.
is the pointer to a call back function which is called when a particular event occurs.
is a void pointer to data to be referenced to by the CallbackFunc

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function will enable the interrupts present in the interrupt mask passed onto the function.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on
is the interrupt mask which need to be enabled in core

briefdescription.para: This function will disable the interrupts present in the interrupt mask passed onto the function.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on
is the interrupt mask which need to be enabled in core

briefdescription.para: This function will get the interrupt mask set (enabled) in the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt enable register

briefdescription.para: This function will get the list of interrupts Invoked in the Interrupt Status Register of the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This function will clear the interrupts set in the Interrupt Status Register of the DSI core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XDsi2Rx instance to operate on
is Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt to be cleared in the Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the DSI core.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the Invoked interrupt from the Interrupt Status register determines the source of the interrupts and calls the respective callbacks for the interrupts that are enabled in Interrupt Enable register and finally clears the interrupts.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this core is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XDsi2Rx_SetCallback() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDsi2Rx core instance.

simplesect.para: Interrupt should be enabled to execute interrupt handler.

detaileddescription.para: Look up the hardware settings using Base Address.
This file implements the functions which handle the interrupts in the DSI TX Controller.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 Kuna 18/4/24 First release

detaileddescription.para: The hardware setting is inside the configuration table in xdsi2rx_g.c, generated by yaml and DT or manually by the user.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 Kunal 18/04/24 First release
